message:
test(bd-3dn2): add unit tests for event_store config, accessors, and edge cases

Cover EventStoreConfig defaults, Default trait, config() accessor,
non-existent stream/ID queries, create_shared_event_store_with_config,
cleanup_expired removing empty streams, and stats config fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
